name: Bridge Cleaner Runner Game
description: Welcome to Bridge Cleaner Runner Game, an exciting and addictive running adventure where speed, timing, and cleaning skills come together! Get ready to run across dirty bridges, clean the path, avoid obstacles, and complete challenging levels in this fun casual runner game. In Bridge Cleaner Runner Game, your mission is simple but engaging: run forward, clean the bridge surface, remove dirt and obstacles, and reach the finish line safely. As you progress, the game becomes more challenging with faster speed, narrow paths, moving obstacles, and tricky bridge sections that test your reflexes and focus.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
